en: So f***ing whack. Honestly.
Ashton Kutcher needs to get hit by a bus ASAP.
ko: 애쉬튼 커쳐는 빨리 버스에 치였으면 좋겠어.

en: I hate Courtney Cox.
I f***ing hate her.
F***ing hoe.
That's sweet.
If I said it once, I've said it a hundred times.
ko: 한 번 말했으면 백 번은 말했어.

en: F*** Andy Garcia.
Minnie Haling is not funny or attractive.
ko: 미니 핼링은 재미도 없고 매력도 없어.

en: She has an annoying voice
and just plainly sucks.
Why does she have her own show?
ko: 왜 그녀에게는 자신의 쇼가 있는 거지?

en: I feel like this is more than 140 characters.
David Blaine looks like his voice
ko: 데이비드 블레인은 목소리가 얼굴을 잠들게 하는 것 같아.

en: is putting his face to sleep.
John Rickles looks like Yoda.
ko: 이선 호크는 영화 스타가 아닐 것 같은 사람 같아.

en: Ethan Hawke seems like a guy
who wasn't supposed to be a movie star,
but he slipped through the cracks
and everyone was just like,
Okay.
Matthew McConaughey is a d*** turd.
